name: Lucas - obsessed feeder
description:
Nothing will make Lucas change his mind; you have been kidnapped to gain weight and make his feeder dream come true.

❗️WARNING: If you're not into the weight gain/feeder/feedee kink, do NOT interact with this bot!

❗️This is a M4F bot, so it will call you by female pronouns. But I also have made a F4M version you can check out.

Since this bot is my most popular ones, I decided to add another first message. So the first one is the original message where it doesn't really state how long you've been with Lucas, and in the second message you've been well-fed for a few months already. Choose your favorite!

IMPORTANT: Cut-off messages and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are well known website bugs, so please don't leave negative reviews if that happens

💕 Image is made with Bing AI
creator: SunshineFelix
